Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: It’s time to mock everything in place in our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Mocking Up a New 1974 Bronco

Video.summary: We welcome legendary custom car builder Chris Ryan and his team to help with our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Image.alt: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Video.summary: It’s final assembly for our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Image.alt: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.
Video.title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Image.alt: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Video.summary: The guys work hard to finish their 1974 build under the hood, under the frame, and under the top.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Image.alt: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Video.summary: The guys show off the completed 1974 Bronco on the floor at SEMA.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Finale

Video.summary: Prepare to be floored by this 1946 Dodge Power Wagon resto-mod from Vintage Dream Machines.
Video.title: Power Wagon

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: We begin the transformation of a tired 1970 Monte Carlo into a modernized G-Machine.
Video.title: '70 Monte Carlo Part 1

Video.summary: MuscleCar gets a hand from HorsePower Mike in stiffening the frame on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 2

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle Undertakes a mission to squeeze everything that they can out of a tired Iroc Z.
Video.title: Iroc and So Can You!

Video.summary: The guys squeeze their budget and also do some free fixes to freshen up the budget Iroc’s interior.
Video.title: Low Buck Iroc Interior

Video.summary: Take a look at how SEMA cars are built just a couple of weeks out from the big show
Video.title: SEMA Mustang Thrash

Video.summary: Learn a low-buck way to rescue faded, nasty paint. Also, the budget IROC goes for a drive.
Video.title: IROC Paint Overhaul and Payoff

Video.summary: The EBC Brakes and Pedal Commander Charger gets its voice as Tommy installs the exhaust and suspension.
Video.title: Singing Lessons

Video.summary: The EBC Brakes and Pedal Commander Dodge Charger gets its final touches before hitting the track.
Video.title: Brake the Pavement

Video.summary: See if your top ten muscle car list matches ours.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 1

Video.summary: Have we missed any? Here is the conclusion of our top 10 American Muscle Cars.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 2

Video.summary: MuscleCar demonstrates how to get rid of a gnarly old Vinyl Top on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Part 3

Video.summary: It's time for the finishing touches on the Monte Carlo G-Machine.
Video.title: 70 Monte Carlo Finale

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: An all-aluminum ZL1 Big Block gets plugged into the '69 COPO Camaro tribute.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Image.alt: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Video.summary: Work continues on the COPO Camaro tribute project as the guys get to work building a new suspension system.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Suspension

Video.summary: The guys plug in their revamped front and rear, then modify the car to accept manual floor pedals.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Gains its Feet

Video.summary: Learn how you can improve on the classic Muncie 4-Speed with modern technology.
Video.title: COPO Camaro 4-Speed Build

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys work on getting the interior into the 1969 COPO Camaro Tribute project.
Video.title: COPO Interior and Exhaust

Video.summary: We finalize the COPO Camaro by doing a quick rundown on firing a crate motor for the first time.
Video.title: COPO to Go!

Video.summary: A new project is started: transforming a 1970 Camaro RS into a stock-style RS/SS 396.
Video.title: Project Limelight Debut

Video.summary: Learn how to fix old sheetmetal repairs and rust spots as Rick and Tommy work on the 1970 Camaro.
Video.title: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Image.alt: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Video.summary: Project Limelight turns green, how to paint stripes over clear, and how to refurbish stock wheels.
Video.title: Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb

Image.alt: Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb
Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb
Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb

Video.summary: Limelight gets some engine accessories. Learn how to paint and install a fiberglass hood.
Video.title: Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint

Image.alt: Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint
Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint
Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint

Video.summary: Project Limelight gets some finishing touches and the big block fires up.
Video.title: Project Limelight Payoff

Video.summary: Performance upgrades on our 6.7L Ram continue with install of larger intercooler, & gauges.
Video.title: Ram 3500 Stage One: Gauges & Intercooler

Video.summary: The Ram 1 ton dually gets a bigger badder turbo setup with more airflow for more horsepower. Plus, Advanced P
Video.title: Ram Diesel Turbo Swap & Exhaust

Video.summary: It's an OBS Chevy K1500 4WD we converted to AWD, slammed, and LS swapped!
Video.title: Chevy K1500 Red Tide

Video.summary: You GM fans are in for a real treat as the guys transform a 1985 Buick Regal grandma car.
Video.title: Street Regal

Video.summary: What do you get when you cross a ’53 Willys and an ’84 military CUCV….one heck of an off-road mud wagon!
Video.title: CUCV Mud Wagon

Video.summary: We've up'd the horsepower of our 2016 Ram dually with the air side of things, now onto fuel.
Video.title: Ram Diesel Fuel System Upgrades

Video.summary: Ever wonder how a performance transmission can withstand 800 horsepower?
Video.title: Ram 3500 Bullet-Proof Transmission

Video.summary: Final top end mods, rear locker & traction bars installed before our 1 ton dually hits the strip.
Video.title: Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually

Image.alt: Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually
Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually
Traction Bars for a Ram 3500 Dually

Video.summary: Judgement day for our Ram dually on both the dyno and dragstrip.
Video.title: Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel

Image.alt: Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel
Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel
Dually Draggin' a Ram 3500 Cummins Turbo Diesel

Video.summary: We upgrade our F-250 with a gooseneck hitch, airlift suspension, and enhanced brakes for heavy hauling.
Video.title: Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling

Image.alt: Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling
Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling
Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling

Video.summary: Our Ford F-250 gets a few more features added to help performance and function while hauling.
Video.title: Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features

Image.alt: Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features
Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features
Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features

Video.summary: The guys visit DBR Performance and their first chance ever to drive a Jeep TrackHawk.
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: Our Jeep TrashHawk gets the upgraded axles, brakes, and suspension it will need to handle 707 horses.
Video.title: Suspension of Jeep Belief

Video.summary: It’s time for some high performance fun at the National Corvette Museum Motorsports Park track.
Video.title: Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track

Image.alt: Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track
Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track
Jeep Wagoneer Transformed: “TrashHawk” Hits The Track

Video.summary: This is a complete thrash as we turn a Jeep Wagoneer into a 700+ horsepower, two-wheel drive monster.
Video.title: Jeep “TrashHawk” Readies for the Speedway
